title: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen Model Cards
citation: DeepSeek AI. DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen model cards. Hugging Face. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Planning source for local reasoning model candidates and usage recommendations for distilled DeepSeek-Qwen models.
claims_supported: DeepSeek describes open-sourced distilled 1.5B, 7B, 14B, 32B, and larger R1-derived dense models based on Qwen and Llama families.
The DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and 14B model cards list MIT license.
The model card provides usage recommendations including temperature 0.5-0.7 and notes about avoiding endless repetition or incoherent outputs.
claims_not_supported: That the models are installed locally.
That any distilled model is safe or valid for autonomous medical advice.
That a 14B or 32B quantization meets OpenClinXR latency targets on this machine.
